items.quote: I think Usuzman's past his finest hour.

items.claim: Usuzman lacks the ability to defeat DDP.
items.quote: I don't think Usuzman is a guy to beat DDP.

items.claim: Montes has a history of finishing UFC-level opponents.
items.quote: Montes has finished quality UFC level guys.

items.claim: Usuzman's only path to victory is a decision.
items.quote: Usman decision is the only path.

items.claim: Usuzman's jab is a high-level weapon.
Usuzman is willing to engage in striking exchanges that leave him vulnerable to DDP's power.
items.quote: Usman willing to strike enough for DDP to land something big.

items.claim: Damen Anderson is an undefeated, high-level grappler.
items.quote: Damen Anderson, undefeated, high level grappler.

items.claim: Ezra Elliott is an undefeated MMA Lab prospect.
items.quote: Ezra Elliott, undefeated, MMA Lab prospect.

items.claim: Montes is dangerous if he secures a neck submission.
items.quote: If he grabs the neck, anybody's in trouble.

items.claim: Jared is difficult to knock out.
Bashie is too young and inexperienced to handle Delgado.
items.quote: I think Bashu will get bullied this time out. He's too young and green.
